---
title: file-length-limit
description: "Limit source-file length."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Limit source-file length. Strider default: disabled at 0 lines.

## Bad

```go
// A source file longer than the configured line limit.
```

## Good

```go
// A source file within the configured line limit.
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only file-length-limit`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
